2604.07239.title: Efficient Learned Data Compression via Dual-Stream Feature Decoupling
2604.07239.paper_summary: While Learned Data Compression (LDC) has achieved superior compression ratios, balancing precise probability modeling with system efficiency remains challenging. Crucially, uniform single-stream architectures struggle to simultaneously capture micro-syntactic and macro-semantic features, necessitating deep serial stacking that exacerbates latency. Compounding this, heterogeneous systems are constrained by device speed mismatches, where throughput is capped by Amdahl's Law due to serial processing. To this end, we propose a Dual-Stream Multi-Scale Decoupler that disentangles local and global contexts to replace deep serial processing with shallow parallel streams, and incorporate a Hierarchical Gated Refiner for adaptive feature refinement and precise probability modeling. Furthermore, we design a Concurrent Stream-Parallel Pipeline, which overcomes systemic bottlenecks to achieve full-pipeline parallelism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both compression ratio and throughput, while maintaining the lowest latency and memory usage. The code is available at https://github.com/huidong-ma/FADE.
2604.07239.paper_summary_zh: 雖然學習數據壓縮（LDC）已實現卓越的壓縮比，但在精確的概率建模與系統效率之間保持平衡仍然具有挑戰性。關鍵是，均勻的單流架構難以同時捕捉微語法和宏語義特徵，這需要深度串行堆疊，進而加劇延遲。更糟的是，異構系統受到設備速度不匹配的限制，因為根據阿姆達爾法則，串行處理使得吞吐量受到限制。為此，我們提出了一種雙流多尺度解耦器，該解耦器將局部和全局上下文分離，以用淺層並行流替代深度串行處理，並結合一個層次門控精煉器，用於自適應特徵精煉和精確的概率建模。此外，我們設計了一個並行流-並行管道，克服系統瓶頸以實現全管道並行性。大量實驗表明，我們的方法在壓縮比和吞吐量方面達到了最先進的性能，同時保持最低的延遲和內存使用。代碼可在 https://github.com/huidong-ma/FADE 獲得。
2604.07239.author: Huidong Ma et.al.
2604.07239.authors: Huidong Ma, Xinyan Shi, Hui Sun, Xiaofei Yue, Xiaoguang Liu, Gang Wang, Wentong Cai
